_description: Reproduction fixture for Q3.6-1 (Qwen3.6 preserve_thinking default-on flip). Conversation has an assistant turn with reasoning_content set BEFORE the last user message. Without preserve_thinking=true, upstream Qwen3.6 drops the historical <think> block. The patched template flips the default so historical thinking is preserved unless preserve_thinking=False is passed explicitly.

messages.reasoning_content: HISTORICAL_REASONING_MARKER: 2+2 is a basic arithmetic operation; the answer is 4.
